scripts.test:backend: node e2e-bridge/server.mjs & BRIDGE_PID=$!; sleep 1; vitest run tests/backend; RESULT=$?; kill $BRIDGE_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $RESULT
scripts.test:e2e: node e2e-bridge/server.mjs & BRIDGE_PID=$!; sleep 1; VITE_E2E=1 playwright test --project=chromium; RESULT=$?; kill $BRIDGE_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $RESULT
scripts.test:e2e:headed: node e2e-bridge/server.mjs & BRIDGE_PID=$!; sleep 1; VITE_E2E=1 playwright test --project=chromium --headed; RESULT=$?; kill $BRIDGE_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $RESULT
scripts.test:consolidate: npx tsx scripts/consolidate-reports.ts && npx tsx scripts/write-coverage.ts && npx tsx scripts/write-plan.ts
scripts.test:accounting:fast: npm run test:oracle && npm run test:backend && npm run test:consolidate
scripts.test:accounting:full: sh -c 'RC=0; npm run test:oracle || RC=$?; npm run test:backend || RC=$?; npm run test:e2e || RC=$?; npm run test:consolidate; exit $RC'
